## What changed

<!-- Briefly describe what you did and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — config, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] `style` — formatting, styles (no logic changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is lint-clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] Tested on Android / iOS emulator or physical device
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] No hardcoded strings that should be constants

## Screenshots / Video (if UI change)

<!-- Add a screenshot or screen recording if you changed the UI -->
